listing.name: agentstack
listing.tagline: Full backend for AI agents — one MCP, 80+ actions, 30-second install
listing.description: Stop writing boilerplate. AgentStack gives your AI agent auth, DB (8DNA JSON+), RBAC, subscriptions (Buffs), payments, rules engine, RAG with TurboQuant, storage, scheduler, and more — through one MCP tool (agentstack.execute). Install via OAuth Device Code flow in 30 seconds; no copy-pasting API keys.
